name: WATI WhatsApp Business API Platform
what_it_does: WhatsApp Business API platform with REST API for sending messages, managing contacts, building chatbots, and running WhatsApp marketing campaigns — providing managed WhatsApp Business API access without direct Meta BSP complexity.
use_cases: Sending WhatsApp Business messages and template notifications via REST API
Building WhatsApp chatbots with automated response flows from agent workflows
Managing customer contact lists and WhatsApp conversation history via API
Triggering WhatsApp notifications from CRM events or e-commerce platforms
Running WhatsApp broadcast campaigns to customer segments programmatically
not_for: SMS and voice messaging (WATI is WhatsApp-only)
Teams needing direct Meta BSP access without managed middleware
High-volume enterprise messaging requiring direct carrier-grade infrastructure
best_when: A business needs WhatsApp Business API access with managed platform features (chatbot builder, contact management) without direct Meta BSP complexity.
avoid_when: You need multi-channel messaging beyond WhatsApp, or require direct Meta BSP access for enterprise control.

auth.notes: Bearer token from WATI account. Passed as Authorization header. Account-scoped access. Webhook support for message delivery and received message events. No OAuth — simple token auth.

pricing.paid_tiers: Growth from $49/month; Pro from $99; Business from $299; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: WhatsApp conversation charges from Meta apply on top of WATI platform fee. Popular in India, Southeast Asia, and LATAM markets. Good for SMBs wanting easy WhatsApp Business API access.

performance.rate_limits: Meta WhatsApp rate limits apply; WATI platform limits per plan

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers contacts, messages, and broadcast sessions. Webhook support for message events. Template message pre-approval required. API documentation covers key use cases with examples.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message sends create new messages. Contact creation/update is upsert by phone number. Template broadcast campaigns are non-idempotent — each trigger sends to full list.
known_agent_gotchas: WhatsApp template messages must be pre-approved by Meta before sending
24-hour conversation window limits non-template replies after last user message
Meta WhatsApp API rate limits apply independently of WATI platform limits
Business verification with Meta required before access — not instant setup

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token auth. GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. WhatsApp encryption end-to-end at Meta level. WATI as managed BSP adds middleware layer.
